name: Manta White Noise Machine
description_html:
Noisy neighbors? Snoring partner? Busy brain? Block out every distraction and take control of your sleep with the Manta White Noise Machine.

Designed to go where noise gets in, the soothing sounds spread across the room to mask disruptions – helping you fall asleep and stay asleep.

  • One-click start with your preferred sound, timer and volume settings
  • Tactile LED-free control pad that's easy to use anytime of night – no apps or voice commands
  • Auto-off sleep timer with a choice of 30 min, 1 hr, 2 hr, 4 hr, 8 hr or constant playback
  • Precise volume adjustments so you can dial in the perfect level for your space
  • Effective for sleep, work and travel, helping you block out distractions anytime, anywhere

Includes 1x Manta White Noise Machine with 8 ft (2.5 m) power cord and 1x Control Pad.
tags: Sublabel_the world's most effective noise-blocking system

name: Manta White Noise Machine (Dual Speaker)
description_html:
The dual-speaker noise-blocking system for deeper sleep

  • 2x speakers create an expansive sound shield to block multiple noise sources
  • Tactile control pad for remote adjustment of both speakers simultaneously
  • One-click start — no voice commands or apps required
  • 15 meticulously crafted, gapless sounds engineered for sleep optimization
  • Powerful sound output that blocks even the most disruptive noise
  • LED-free, durable, zero-maintenance design

Includes 1x Manta White Noise Machine with 8 ft (2.5 m) power cord, 1x Booster Speaker with 8ft (2.5m) power cord and 1x Control Pad.

Please note that one Manta White Noise Machine (inclusive of one speaker and one control pad) can only be paired with one Booster Speaker.
